title: Zero-config quickstart: 5 lines from npm install to verified handshake
description: The current `proveHandshake` requires the caller to resolve WASM/zkey paths, construct Merkle proof objects, and manage nonce generation. Add a `BolyraClient` class with `new BolyraClient({ provider })` that auto-discovers circuit artifacts (embedded via `postinstall` or resolved from `@bolyra/artifacts`), fetches Merkle proofs from the on-chain registry, generates session nonces, and exposes `client.handshake(humanSecret, agentCredential)` returning a verified result. Target: `npm install @bolyra/sdk && const result = await new BolyraClient({provider}).handshake(secret, cred)` — 5 lines including import.
